---
title: Figuring things out...
author: Chris Kornaros
date: 2026-06-06
categories:
- blog
- ai
- research
published: '2026-06-06'
---

```{=html}
<div class="substack-post-embed"><p lang="en">Figuring things out... by Chris Kornaros</p><p></p><a data-post-link href="https://chriskornaros.substack.com/p/figuring-things-out">Read on Substack</a></div><script async src="https://substack.com/embedjs/embed.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
```
